workshoptitle: Build a Prometheus-Compatible Telemetry Endpoint for ADB-D Using ORDS

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Introduction to building a Prometheus endpoint on ADB-D

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Create the Exporter Schema and PL/SQL Package
tutorials.description: Create a dedicated schema and the PL/SQL function that generates Prometheus exposition format

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Create the ORDS REST Endpoint
tutorials.description: Use ORDS source_type_media to serve raw Prometheus text

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Secure the Endpoint with OAuth2
Lab 4: Deploy Prometheus and Grafana
tutorials.description: Launch a compute instance and install the observability stack

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Build a Grafana Dashboard
tutorials.description: Import a 16-panel dashboard for real-time ADB-D monitoring

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Set Up a Grafana Alert
tutorials.description: Configure proactive alerting for Host CPU Utilization
